description: Phase 004 of 004 in json-mode-hybrid-enrichment: Domains D (Indexing & Crawlability) + F (Semantic Quality & Cross-Session Coherence). Fixes embedding visibility (RetryStats in memory_health), trigger phrase noise (path fragments, n-gram shingles), template consumption gaps (toolCalls, exchanges silently discarded), phantom OPTIONAL_PLACEHOLDERs, and cross-session dedup safeguards.

P0: Surface RetryStats through memory_health MCP tool
P1: Add template sections for toolCalls and exchanges fields
P2: Un-suppress 9 OPTIONAL_PLACEHOLDERs with active data sources
Add multi-token path fragment detection to post-save review
Add pre-save MCP query for overlapping memories
Add observation dedup at normalization time

coordinationNote: Phase 4 (OPTIONAL_PLACEHOLDERS cleanup) must land after sibling 003-field-integrity-and-schema to avoid merge conflicts on template-renderer.ts
